title: Passing Props
description: Pass a value from a parent component to a child component using props.
problemStatement:
Data flow! Create a `User` component that receives a `name` via props and displays `"User: {props.name}"`. In your `App` component, render `<User name="Alice" />`.

**Requirement:** Access the prop inside `User` using the `props` object.
hints: Props are passed to the function as the first argument.
